# bl-monolith-tool

Pre-refactor state. Two capabilities owned in one skill — refactor
splits these into two siblings, then retires this one with a redirect.

## When to Use

- Capability A — fixture stub.
- Capability B — fixture stub.

## When NOT to Use

- Outside fixture tests.

### Stage 2 — Capability B
